author: Dr15Jones
body:
#### PR description:

- Moving ExternalRandomNumberGeneratorService directly into the executables rather than in libGeneratorIterfaceCore avoids bringing in the FORTRAN symbols in that library into that executable which are at odds with the same symbols in dynamically loadable plugins.
- Improved ExternalGeneratorFilter so it will not cause a segmentation fault when the framework is _unwinding_ from an exception happening earlier in the job.

#### PR validation:

Tested running on workflow 280.0 step1 which works after this change.

resolves #50620
resolves https://github.com/cms-sw/framework-team/issues/2133
title: Avoid FORTRAN linkage problem in  GeneratorInterface/Core
